description: REQ-EDIT-034 specifies copy_note_body receives { noteId, body } — two fields only. The Rust implementation at editor.rs:302-308 declares an additional issued_at: String parameter that is NOT in the specification. Tauri renames issued_at to issuedAt via camelCase. The TS adapter (tauriEditorAdapter.ts:71) sends only { noteId, body } without issuedAt. This causes Tauri IPC to fail at runtime with a deserialization error because issuedAt is a required String field missing from the invoke payload.

evidence.snippet: pub fn copy_note_body(note_id: String, body: String, issued_at: String)
